title: Map Command, Page State, Navigation Invariants, and Transactional Updates · Spiral Systems Review
summary: A delayed ranger review reconstructs map command, page state, navigation invariants, and transactional updates from revision, command, arguments, request identity, response fixture, state transition, cache decision, goroutine ownership, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for transactional Pokemon page navigator after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Store current resource, offset, limit, next, previous, result identities, and revision as one explicit page state.
Compute candidate navigation, fetch and validate it, then commit state only after success.
Disable or explain next and back at absent-link boundaries and reject negative, excessive, or mismatched pagination state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
